evidenceReviewed.source: OpenSpec artifacts: proposal, design, contract-validation spec, traceability, tasks, README validation guidance, `openspec-autopilot` skill guidance, and package script contracts.
evidenceReviewed.summary: OpenSpec artifacts: proposal, design, contract-validation spec, traceability, tasks, README validation guidance, `openspec-autopilot` skill guidance, and package script contracts.

evidenceReviewed.source: Tool outputs / validation: `node tools/test-autopilot-check.ts`, `node tools/test-pre-push-validate.ts`, `node tools/test-autopilot-instruction-drift.ts`, `npm run validate`, `npm test`, `npm run openspec:validate`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level cheap`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level standard --change add-autopilot-continuous-validation-gates`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level prepush`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level final --change add-autopilot-auto-parallel-claims`, and `npm run prepush:validate` passed on 2026-06-12.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Tool outputs / validation: `node tools/test-autopilot-check.ts`, `node tools/test-pre-push-validate.ts`, `node tools/test-autopilot-instruction-drift.ts`, `npm run validate`, `npm test`, `npm run openspec:validate`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level cheap`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level standard --change add-autopilot-continuous-validation-gates`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level prepush`, `npm run autopilot:check -- --level final --change add-autopilot-auto-parallel-claims`, and `npm run prepush:validate` passed on 2026-06-12.

evidenceReviewed.source: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, and `instruction-artifact-reviewer` found material issues first, then final rechecks found no P0/P1 blockers after fixes.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Reviewer gates: `code-quality-reviewer`, `test-coverage-reviewer`, and `instruction-artifact-reviewer` found material issues first, then final rechecks found no P0/P1 blockers after fixes.

evidenceReviewed.source: Autopilot/runtime events: `/autopilot` returned `reasonCode: active_change_handoff`, selected `add-autopilot-continuous-validation-gates`, and advanced no plugin-owned runtime state because no applicable Autopilot ledger owns runtime dispatch.
evidenceReviewed.summary: Autopilot/runtime events: `/autopilot` returned `reasonCode: active_change_handoff`, selected `add-autopilot-continuous-validation-gates`, and advanced no plugin-owned runtime state because no applicable Autopilot ledger owns runtime dispatch.

problems.problem: Scoped ledger and change scopes could silently mismatch
problems.evidence: Code-quality review found explicit `--ledger` could be filtered away by `--change`
problems.impact: A user could receive a successful no-ledger check after targeting the wrong ledger
problems.rootCause: Scope validation treated `--ledger` and `--change` as independent filters rather than a conflicting user intent signal
problems.recommendation: Add blocking scope mismatch detection and a regression test
problems.noFollowUpReason: Add blocking scope mismatch detection and a regression test

problems.problem: Static scope blockers still ran broad commands
problems.evidence: Code-quality review found final without `--change` planned repository validation and tests
problems.impact: Mis-scoped checks could waste time and obscure the real blocker
problems.rootCause: Blocking scope validation happened after command planning instead of short-circuiting the planner
problems.recommendation: Short-circuit command execution when blocking scope errors exist
problems.noFollowUpReason: Short-circuit command execution when blocking scope errors exist

problems.evidence: Test-coverage review found `pre-push-validate.ts` did not include an Autopilot evidence freshness gate
problems.impact: Changed report/task/ledger artifacts could miss stale-evidence checks before push
problems.rootCause: Pre-push validation had a separate planning path from Autopilot freshness checks
problems.recommendation: Add shared freshness planning to pre-push and tests for blocking freshness failures
problems.noFollowUpReason: Add shared freshness planning to pre-push and tests for blocking freshness failures

problems.problem: Scoped-ledger absolute path output leaked local paths
problems.evidence: Test-coverage review found outside absolute `--ledger` JSON echoed the host path
problems.impact: Machine-readable failure output could expose local filesystem details
problems.rootCause: Error serialization reused raw path evidence before applying repository-boundary redaction
problems.recommendation: Redact outside scoped ledger paths as `<outside-repo>` and add CLI regression coverage
problems.noFollowUpReason: Redact outside scoped ledger paths as `<outside-repo>` and add CLI regression coverage

problems.evidence: Instruction review found `autopilot:check -- --level final` can create/update retro follow-ups but README/skill presented it as a routine check
problems.impact: Agents could run mutation-capable final gates in read-only or routine ready-to-land contexts
problems.rootCause: Documentation did not distinguish write-authorized final gates from read-only/status checks
problems.recommendation: Document final mode as write-authorized only and route routine ready-to-land to prepush
problems.noFollowUpReason: Document final mode as write-authorized only and route routine ready-to-land to prepush

problems.problem: Autopilot check module grew near split threshold
problems.evidence: Final code-quality recheck reported `tools/autopilot-check.ts` above 800 lines
problems.rootCause: Planner, executor, and CLI responsibilities accumulated in one cohesive module during feature growth
problems.recommendation: Keep current cohesive module for acceptance; split planner/executor/CLI only if it grows further
problems.noFollowUpReason: Keep current cohesive module for acceptance; split planner/executor/CLI only if it grows further

archiveGate.reason: Evidence reviewed, material reviewer findings fixed in scope, final reviewer rechecks found no blockers, validation passed, and no actionable follow-up findings remain
